name: pagemint
description: Privacy-first browser capture product for saving web pages as trustworthy PDFs.

scripts.test: pnpm run test:scaffold && pnpm run test:contracts
scripts.test:scaffold: node tests/scaffold/verify-scaffold.mjs && node tests/scaffold/prepare-hermetic-workspace.mjs && node --test tests/unit/package-shape.test.mjs && node --import ./tests/setup-env.mjs --loader ./tests/loader.mjs --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/unit/*.test.ts
scripts.test:contracts: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --allowImportingTsExtensions --module ESNext --moduleResolution bundler --target ES2022 --strict --skipLibCheck tests/types/exact-export-contract.typecheck.ts
scripts.repo:verify:prebuild: pnpm run lint && pnpm test && pnpm run test:workspace && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test:browser
scripts.repo:verify: pnpm run repo:verify:prebuild && pnpm run clean:site-build && pnpm run build
scripts.chrome-store:prepare: pnpm --filter @pagemint/extension icons && pnpm --filter @pagemint/extension tiles && pnpm --filter @pagemint/extension screenshots && pnpm --filter @pagemint/extension zip && pnpm run chrome-store:preflight
